query: SELECT id, name, HEX(name) as hex_name FROM livers WHERE name LIKE '%Ryu kyogoku%' LIMIT 1; SELECT DISTINCT streamerName, HEX(streamerName) as hex_name, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM brand_livestreams WHERE liverId = (SELECT id FROM livers WHERE name LIKE '%Ryu kyogoku%' LIMIT 1) GROUP BY streamerName LIMIT 5;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user ViCMbGRGvoSuVwV.root --database GgA9WvTBCZMf6mjyMMwACw --execute SELECT id, name, HEX(name) as hex_name FROM livers WHERE name LIKE '%Ryu kyogoku%' LIMIT 1; SELECT DISTINCT streamerName, HEX(streamerName) as hex_name, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM brand_livestreams WHERE liverId = (SELECT id FROM livers WHERE name LIKE '%Ryu kyogoku%' LIMIT 1) GROUP BY streamerName LIMIT 5;
